stemHtml: Because of friction, the surface wind speed at an airport may be reduced. If an aircraft climbs out of an airport area with a slight tailwind, the pilot might experience...

options.a: an increase in airspeed and rate of climb due to decreasing tailwind.
options.b: a deacrease in airspeed and climb performance due to decreasing tailwind.
options.c: an increase in airspeed and rate of climb due to increasing tailwind.
options.d: a decrease in airspeed and rate of climb due to increasing tailwind.
